subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! The Beauty of the All-Merciful, the Temple of the Self-Subsisting, the Sovereign upon the throne of glory, and the King of the realm of the All-Merciful [3.5s]... ...Not a single morn did He find comfort; not a single night did He repose in peace. So intense did His tribulations become
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی جمال رحمانی و هیکل صمدانی و سلطان سریر عزت و ملیک ملک رحمانیت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
